explanation: I don't have direct access to Freshcaller data, but I can help you track support interactions through our ticket system. Let me know what specific call/support metrics would be most valuable to see!

quickActions.label: Create Support Operations Dashboard
quickActions.prompt: Create a dashboard showing today's ticket volume, response times, and channel breakdown

quickActions.label: Show Team Performance Today
quickActions.prompt: Show me support team performance metrics for today

quickActions.label: Track Phone Support Metrics
quickActions.prompt: Create widgets showing phone channel support tickets and response times
